meaning: n.[动](鸟、 昆虫、蚯蚓等的)前胃
examples: The proventriculus histological structure was mucosa, submucosa, muscularis and serosa, from the inside to the outside.
The epithelium thickness of proventriculus was the thickest in Mongolia sheep group, and the thinnest in Texel sheep group.
The crop, proventriculus and paunch of workers in T. ampliceps is evidently longer and wider than in O. formosanus (P<0.01).
